zh.lifeSummary: 當Jonet Verch Gruffydd ApLlewellyn ApHowel ApHwlki於1485年出生在威爾士安格萊時，她的父親Gruffudd ap Llywelyn31歲，母親Catrin ferch John34歲。她和John AP Madog Bodvel至少有2個兒子。她去世於1560年在她的家鄉享年75歲。

meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

nameMeanings.name: Gruffydd
meanings: Welsh: The Welsh name; from creffydd, strong faith, or strong in faith. Gruffydd, a Welsh form of Gryffydd.

en.lifeSummary: When Jonet Verch Gruffydd ApLlewellyn ApHowel ApHwlki was born in 1485, in Anglesey, Wales, her father, Gruffudd ap Llywelyn, was 31 and her mother, Catrin ferch John, was 34. She had at least 2 sons with John AP Madog Bodvel. She died in 1560, in her hometown, at the age of 75.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jonet Verch Gruffydd ApLlewellyn ApHowel ApHwlki est née en 1485, à Anglesey, Galles, son père, Gruffudd ap Llywelyn, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Catrin ferch John, avait 34 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils avec John AP Madog Bodvel. Elle est décédée en 1560, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 75 ans.

de.Llanfair Dyffryn Clwyd, Denbighshire, Wa: Llanfair Dyffryn Clwyd, Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Jonet Verch Gruffydd ApLlewellyn ApHowel ApHwlki 1485 in Anglesey, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gruffudd ap Llywelyn 31 und ihre Mutter Catrin ferch John 34. Sie hatte mit John AP Madog Bodvel mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb 1560 im Alter von 75 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jonet Verch Gruffydd ApLlewellyn ApHowel ApHwlki è nata il nel 1485 nel Anglesey, Galles, sua padre, Gruffudd ap Llywelyn, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Catrin ferch John, aveva 34 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli con John AP Madog Bodvel. Morì nel 1560, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 75 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jonet Verch Gruffydd ApLlewellyn ApHowel ApHwlkiが1485年にウェールズアングレセイで生まれた時，父Gruffudd ap Llywelynは31歳，母Catrin ferch Johnは34歳であった。彼女はJohn AP Madog Bodvelとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1560年に故郷で75歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jonet Verch Gruffydd ApLlewellyn ApHowel ApHwlki(이)가 1485년 웨일스 앤글레시에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gruffudd ap Llywelyn(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Catrin ferch John(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 John AP Madog Bodvel(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1560년 그녀의 고향에서 75세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos com John AP Madog Bodvel. Ela faleceu em 1560, em sua cidade natal, com 75 anos.

ru.Llanfair Dyffryn Clwyd, Denbighshire, Wa: лланфеир диффрин клвид, денбаишир, Уэльс, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jonet Verch Gruffydd ApLlewellyn ApHowel ApHwlki родилась в 1485 г. в местности англеси, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Gruffudd ap Llywelyn было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Catrin ferch John, 34. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына от John AP Madog Bodvel. Она умерла в 1560 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 75 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jonet Verch Gruffydd ApLlewellyn ApHowel ApHwlki nació en 1485, en Isla Oscura, Gales, su papá, Gruffudd ap Llywelyn, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Catrin ferch John, tenía 34 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos con John AP Madog Bodvel. Murió en 1560, en su pueblo, a la edad de 75 años.
